text: Would you eat a live tarantula (chew and swallow) for $150,000?
Would you be waterboarded for 30 seconds (feels like drowning) for $300,000?
Would you fight Mike Tyson in his prime (3 rounds, expect broken bones) for $1 million?
Would you swim with great white sharks in open water (no cage) for $500,000?
Would you eat only dog food for 1 year (breakfast, lunch, dinner) for $400,000?
Would you get tasered 10 times in one day for $75,000?
Would you let Mike Tyson break your arm (medical care provided, full recovery) for $300,000?
Would you live in a house with 50+ venomous snakes loose for 30 days for $2 million?
Would you eat a bowl of live maggots and worms for $200,000?
Would you base jump off Burj Khalifa (world's tallest building) for $750,000?
Would you let a UFC heavyweight punch you full force (expect broken face) for $50,000?

Would you sleep in a morgue with dead bodies for 30 nights for $300,000?

Would you get a root canal with zero anesthesia for $100,000?
Would you eat hákarl (rotten fermented shark, world's most disgusting food) for $30,000?
Would you take a lie detector test about your darkest secrets live on TV for $750,000?
Would you wrestle a 10-foot alligator (handlers nearby) for $600,000?
Would you get pepper sprayed directly in the eyes and hold them open for $100,000?
Would you stand naked in a -40°F freezer for 2 hours for $200,000?

Would you spend 30 days in solitary confinement (no human contact, no books) for $750,000?
Would you eat a family-size jar of wasabi in one sitting for $150,000?
Would you have all 4 wisdom teeth removed without any anesthesia for $400,000?
Would you bungee jump off the world's highest bridge (Macau Tower, 764 feet) for $500,000?
Would you hold dry ice in your bare hands for 5 minutes for $200,000?
Would you get pepper sprayed and tear gassed at the same time for $100,000?
Would you live with 100+ rats in your apartment for 1 year for $800,000?
